overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a historic urban district resembling New Orleans' French Quarter. The character crosses a street at a crosswalk as a vintage blue car passes by, with distinctive wrought-iron balcony architecture visible throughout.

events.description: character steps from cobblestone sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk
pedestrian walking opposite direction passes by the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from sidewalk onto the crosswalk, approaching the center of the street

notable_agents.action: man in jacket walking toward the camera, passing by on the crosswalk

entered.detail: three-story historic building with ornate wrought iron balconies and hanging plants
vertical sign with 'ROSE' lettering on the right side building facade
white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt street
tall curved street lamp post along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a cobblestone sidewalk in a historic district, approaching a crosswalk. The distinctive wrought iron building dominates the left side while a theater sign is visible on the right. The character steps onto the crosswalk and encounters a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: blue vintage sedan drives past from left to right, crossing in front of the character
character reaches the far side of the street, transitioning from crosswalk to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing across the street through the crosswalk as a car passes by

notable_agents.action: blue vintage sedan driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles along the far side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues crossing the open street intersection. A blue vintage sedan drives past from left to right, temporarily blocking the view. The wrought iron building remains prominent on the left as the character approaches the far sidewalk, with street lamps and parked cars visible ahead.

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the curve of the street sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street curb, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in white sweater walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb
black public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the cobblestone sidewalk on the far side. The wrought iron building recedes into the distance on the left while street furniture like a fire hydrant and trash can appear on the right. The character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction as the historic street continues ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a historic urban intersection, moving from one cobblestone sidewalk to another. It begins with the character approaching a crosswalk, flanked by a prominent wrought-iron building on the left and a theater sign on the right. As the character steps into the street, the view is momentarily interrupted by a blue vintage sedan driving past from left to right. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the far side of the intersection, passing street lamps and parked cars. Finally, the camera follows the character along the opposite cobblestone sidewalk, where the wrought-iron architecture recedes into the distance and street furniture like a fire hydrant and trash can appear on the right.
